items.title: Paris 'punishingly hot' as Western Europe hit by heatwave
items.dek: Hugh Schofield reports from Paris as a heat dome settled over Western Europe bringing temperatures above the average for May.
items.body: Hugh Schofield reports from Paris as a heat dome settled over Western Europe bringing temperatures above the average for May.
items.author: IriLine Desk
